Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Wh-What's up? I was just gonna sneak back into practice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}She took me to the hospital. She insisted after I told her about my knee.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I was at the hospital. My mom insisted. I shouldn't have told her about my knee.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}She made the appointment without telling me, so there was nothing I could do![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Ah, sorry, I know you're just worried about me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 13 8 15 105}You said it. I don't get why my mom and the rest of the team are acting like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It's exhausting having everyone up in your business![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Today, they took some X-rays. They'll give me the results in a few days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Not sure why that has to take so long...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Oh, hey! Don't tell anyone about me going to the hospital, alright?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I feel bad for always asking you to keep things quiet. Sorry 'bout that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto seems appreciative of me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're becoming closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Alright! The doctor told me to take it easy today, but we should still get to practice![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Oh, wait... If you're leaving, that means practice is already over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
